title: TC001-Connect wallet and choose tenant role
description: Verifies a new user can connect a wallet, choose the tenant role, and reach the tenant onboarding outcome for that wallet.
code:
import asyncio
import re
from playwright import async_api
from playwright.async_api import expect

async def run_test():
    pw = None
    browser = None
    context = None

    try:
        pw = await async_api.async_playwright().start()
        browser = await pw.chromium.launch(
            headless=True,
            args=[
                "--window-size=1280,720",
                "--disable-dev-shm-usage",
                "--ipc=host",
                "--single-process"
            ],
        )
        context = await browser.new_context()
        context.set_default_timeout(15000)
        page = await context.new_page()
        # -> navigate
        await page.goto("http://localhost:3000")
        try:
            await page.wait_for_load_state("domcontentloaded", timeout=5000)
        except Exception:
            pass
        
        # -> Click the 'Connect Wallet' button (interactive element index 6) to start the wallet-based authentication flow.
        # button "Connect Wallet"
        elem = page.locator("xpath=/html/body/main/div/div[2]/header/div/button[2]").nth(0)
        await elem.wait_for(state="visible", timeout=10000)
        await elem.click()
        
        # -> Click the in-page 'Connect wallet to enter' button (interactive element index 7) to continue the wallet connection flow and observe whether the app shows role selection or an external wallet approval prompt.
        # button "Connect wallet to enter"
        elem = page.locator("xpath=/html/body/main/div/div[2]/main/div/div[3]/div/button").nth(0)
        await elem.wait_for(state="visible", timeout=10000)
        await elem.click()
        
        # --> Test blocked (AST guard fallback)
        raise AssertionError("Test blocked during agent run: " + "TEST BLOCKED The test could not be run \u2014 the UI requires an external MetaMask browser extension which is not detected and the approval step must be completed outside the app, preventing automation. Observations: - The MetaMask modal shows the 'Browser' tab with status 'Not Detected'. - No in-page approval, role selection, or tenant onboarding UI was available to continue; an external extension ...")
        await asyncio.sleep(5)
    finally:
        if context:
            await context.close()
        if browser:
            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

asyncio.run(run_test())
testError:
TEST BLOCKED

The test could not be run — the UI requires an external MetaMask browser extension which is not detected and the approval step must be completed outside the app, preventing automation.

Observations:
- The MetaMask modal shows the 'Browser' tab with status 'Not Detected'.
- No in-page approval, role selection, or tenant onboarding UI was available to continue; an external extension interaction is required.

title: TC002-Tenant runs a private verification from a shared link
description: A tenant can open a share link, review the requirements, run verification, and arrive at a shared result page with an eligibility outcome.
code:
import asyncio
import re
from playwright import async_api
from playwright.async_api import expect

async def run_test():
    pw = None
    browser = None
    context = None

    try:
        # Start a Playwright session in asynchronous mode
        pw = await async_api.async_playwright().start()

        # Launch a Chromium browser in headless mode with custom arguments
        browser = await pw.chromium.launch(
            headless=True,
            args=[
                "--window-size=1280,720",
                "--disable-dev-shm-usage",
                "--ipc=host",
                "--single-process"
            ],
        )

        # Create a new browser context (like an incognito window)
        context = await browser.new_context()
        # Wider default timeout to match the agent's DOM-stability budget;
        # auto-waiting Playwright APIs (expect, locator.wait_for) inherit this.
        context.set_default_timeout(15000)

        # Open a new page in the browser context
        page = await context.new_page()

        # Interact with the page elements to simulate user flow
        # -> navigate
        await page.goto("http://localhost:3000")
        try:
            await page.wait_for_load_state("domcontentloaded", timeout=5000)
        except Exception:
            pass
        
        # -> Click the 'Connect Wallet' button (index 6) to open the wallet connection UI so the tenant can proceed to a share verification link.
        # button "Connect Wallet"
        elem = page.locator("xpath=/html/body/main/div/div[2]/header/div/button[2]").nth(0)
        await elem.wait_for(state="visible", timeout=10000)
        await elem.click()
        
        # -> Click the on-page 'Connect wallet to enter' button (index 7) to open the wallet connection UI and observe whether an extension approval or wallet modal appears.
        # button "Connect wallet to enter"
        elem = page.locator("xpath=/html/body/main/div/div[2]/main/div/div[3]/div/button").nth(0)
        await elem.wait_for(state="visible", timeout=10000)
        await elem.click()
        
        # --> Assertions to verify final state
        current_url = await page.evaluate("() => window.location.href")
        assert '/verify/' in current_url, "The page should have navigated to the shared verification page after running the verification"
        assert await page.locator("xpath=//*[contains(., 'Eligible')]").nth(0).is_visible(), "The page should show an eligibility outcome after completing verification"
        
        # --> Test blocked by environment/access constraints during agent run
        # Reason: TEST BLOCKED The tenant verification flow could not be completed because the required browser wallet extension (MetaMask) is not available in this test environment, preventing wallet-based authentication and subsequent verification steps. Observations: - The MetaMask connection modal shows the 'Browser' option with status 'Not Detected'. - Wallet-based login cannot proceed without the extension...
        raise AssertionError("Test blocked during agent run: " + "TEST BLOCKED The tenant verification flow could not be completed because the required browser wallet extension (MetaMask) is not available in this test environment, preventing wallet-based authentication and subsequent verification steps. Observations: - The MetaMask connection modal shows the 'Browser' option with status 'Not Detected'. - Wallet-based login cannot proceed without the extension..." + " — the exported script cannot reproduce a PASS in this environment.")
        await asyncio.sleep(5)

    finally:
        if context:
            await context.close()
        if browser:
            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

asyncio.run(run_test())
testError:
TEST BLOCKED

The tenant verification flow could not be completed because the required browser wallet extension (MetaMask) is not available in this test environment, preventing wallet-based authentication and subsequent verification steps.

Observations:
- The MetaMask connection modal shows the 'Browser' option with status 'Not Detected'.
- Wallet-based login cannot proceed without the extension, so the tenant share verification page cannot be reached or executed.

Observations: - The MetaMask "Browser" modal is open and displays 'Not Detected'. - No in-page wallet approval prompt or provider injection appear...
        raise AssertionError("Test blocked during agent run: " + "TEST BLOCKED The wallet connection step could not be completed because no in-browser MetaMask provider is detected in the test environment; therefore the wallet approval (required to choose the landlord role and reach onboarding) cannot be performed. testError:
TEST BLOCKED

The wallet connection step could not be completed because no in-browser MetaMask provider is detected in the test environment; therefore the wallet approval (required to choose the landlord role and reach onboarding) cannot be performed.

Observations:

title: TC004-Unauthenticated user is prevented from opening tenant profile and verification routes
description: An unauthenticated user is redirected away from protected tenant routes and is prompted to authenticate.
code:
import asyncio
import re
from playwright import async_api
from playwright.async_api import expect

async def run_test():
    pw = None
    browser = None
    context = None

    try:
        # Start a Playwright session in asynchronous mode
        pw = await async_api.async_playwright().start()

        # Launch a Chromium browser in headless mode with custom arguments
        browser = await pw.chromium.launch(
            headless=True,
            args=[
                "--window-size=1280,720",
                "--disable-dev-shm-usage",
                "--ipc=host",
                "--single-process"
            ],
        )

        # Create a new browser context (like an incognito window)
        context = await browser.new_context()
        # Wider default timeout to match the agent's DOM-stability budget;
        # auto-waiting Playwright APIs (expect, locator.wait_for) inherit this.
        context.set_default_timeout(15000)

        # Open a new page in the browser context
        page = await context.new_page()

        # Interact with the page elements to simulate user flow
        # -> navigate
        await page.goto("http://localhost:3000")
        try:
            await page.wait_for_load_state("domcontentloaded", timeout=5000)
        except Exception:
            pass
        
        # -> Navigate to http://localhost:3000/profile and verify that unauthenticated access is redirected or shows a Connect Wallet / authentication prompt.
        await page.goto("http://localhost:3000/profile")
        try:
            await page.wait_for_load_state("domcontentloaded", timeout=5000)
        except Exception:
            pass
        
        # -> Navigate to a tenant share verification link (/verify/sample-share) and verify whether the verification flow is blocked for unauthenticated users (should show a wallet/connect prompt or redirect).
        await page.goto("http://localhost:3000/verify/sample-share")
        try:
            await page.wait_for_load_state("domcontentloaded", timeout=5000)
        except Exception:
            pass
        
        # --> Test passed — verified by AI agent
        frame = context.pages[-1]
        current_url = await frame.evaluate("() => window.location.href")
        assert current_url is not None, "Test completed successfully"
        await asyncio.sleep(5)

    finally:
        if context:
            await context.close()
        if browser:
            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

asyncio.run(run_test())

title: TC006-Open the shared verification result page
description: Verifies an anonymous viewer can open a shared verification result and see the overall pass or fail outcome with requirement indicators only.
code:
import asyncio
import re
from playwright import async_api
from playwright.async_api import expect

async def run_test():
    pw = None
    browser = None
    context = None

    try:
        pw = await async_api.async_playwright().start()
        browser = await pw.chromium.launch(
            headless=True,
            args=[
                "--window-size=1280,720",
                "--disable-dev-shm-usage",
                "--ipc=host",
                "--single-process"
            ],
        )
        context = await browser.new_context()
        context.set_default_timeout(15000)
        page = await context.new_page()
        # -> navigate
        await page.goto("http://localhost:3000")
        try:
            await page.wait_for_load_state("domcontentloaded", timeout=5000)
        except Exception:
            pass
        
        # -> Navigate to http://localhost:3000/verify to locate a shared verification result page accessible to anonymous viewers and check for overall pass/fail and requirement indicators.
        await page.goto("http://localhost:3000/verify")
        try:
            await page.wait_for_load_state("domcontentloaded", timeout=5000)
        except Exception:
            pass
        
        # -> input
        # text input aria-label="Verification link or code"
        elem = page.locator("xpath=/html/body/main/div/div[2]/div/form/div/div/input").nth(0)
        await elem.wait_for(state="visible", timeout=10000)
        await elem.fill("abc123")
        
        # -> click
        # button "Continue"
        elem = page.locator("xpath=/html/body/main/div/div[2]/div/form/button").nth(0)
        await elem.wait_for(state="visible", timeout=10000)
        await elem.click()
        
        # --> Test blocked (AST guard fallback)
        raise AssertionError("Test blocked during agent run: " + "TEST BLOCKED A valid shared verification result could not be opened as an anonymous viewer because no accessible shared result was found. Observations: - Navigating to /verify/abc123 shows the message: \"Verification not found \u2014 This link is invalid or has been removed.\" (visible in the page content and screenshot). - No public listing of shared verification results was available to select from,...")
        await asyncio.sleep(5)
    finally:
        if context:
            await context.close()
        if browser:
            await browser.close()
        if pw:
            await pw.stop()

asyncio.run(run_test())
testError:
TEST BLOCKED

A valid shared verification result could not be opened as an anonymous viewer because no accessible shared result was found.

Observations:
- Navigating to /verify/abc123 shows the message: "Verification not found — This link is invalid or has been removed." (visible in the page content and screenshot).
- No public listing of shared verification results was available to select from, and creating or retrieving a valid share link requires wallet-based authentication and flows (Connect Wallet + generate/share), which cannot be completed anonymously in this session.

Conclusion: The anonymous-viewer verification step cannot be completed because no valid public share slug was available and creating one requires wallet authentication and actions outside anonymous access. The test is therefore BLOCKED.
